task_completion.description: Verify the agent accessed the correct survey in LimeSurvey.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The LimeSurvey admin interface is open and the 'Leadership Competency Assessment 360' survey is selected or visible in the active dashboard/settings.

task_completion.description: Verify the survey was converted to closed-access.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Survey participants' screen is visible, indicating the participant table has been initialized (e.g., a table is present instead of the 'Initialize participant table' prompt).

task_completion.description: Verify the four specific participants were added.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The participant table lists Marcus Thompson (m.thompson@acmecorp.com), Sarah Chen (s.chen@acmecorp.com), David Okafor (d.okafor@acmecorp.com), and Priya Sharma (p.sharma@acmecorp.com).

task_completion.description: Verify the invitation email subject was updated.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Email templates' settings page shows the 'Invitation' email subject field contains exactly 'Your 360-Degree Leadership Feedback Request - Action Required'.

task_completion.description: Verify unique access tokens were generated for the participants.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The participant table shows populated, unique alphanumeric strings in the 'Token' column for all four participants, or a success message confirming tokens were generated.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the web browser GUI to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is interacting with the LimeSurvey web interface in a browser, not using terminal commands, curl, or API scripts to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not directly edit the database.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no screenshots of database management tools (like phpMyAdmin or mysql CLI) being used to insert participants or tokens.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not mock up the results in a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The participant list and email templates are modified within the actual LimeSurvey application interface, not typed into a text editor or HTML inspector.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target survey is exactly titled 'Leadership Competency Assessment 360'. There must be exactly 4 participants added: m.thompson@acmecorp.com, s.chen@acmecorp.com, d.okafor@acmecorp.com, and p.sharma@acmecorp.com. The invitation email subject must be set to 'Your 360-Degree Leadership Feedback Request - Action Required'. The survey must be converted to closed-access, which involves initializing a participant table and generating unique tokens for these 4 users.
